hero.title: Your private bank should be selected, not inherited.
hero.subtitle: We help you select and monitor the right private banks and wealth managers in Switzerland.
approach.heading: Diagnose. Select & Negotiate. Monitor.
approach.sub: A transparent, conflict-free process to turn private banking selection into a structured, comparable and monitored decision.
approach.step1.title: Diagnose
approach.step1.body: We clarify your investment objectives and risk profile before assessing your current banking setup.
approach.step2.title: Select & Negotiate
approach.step2.body: We tender across all eligible wealth managers, select the right private bank with you, and negotiate terms.
approach.step3.title: Monitor
approach.step3.body: We track performance, costs, risk and service quality with consolidated online reporting across all providers.
pubs.heading: Insights & perspectives.
pubs.title1: How to benchmark your private bank: a practical framework for families.
pubs.title2: The hidden cost of retrocessions: what your bank earns on your portfolio.
pubs.title3: Banking continuity in estate transitions: what heirs need to know.
cookie.text: We use essential cookies only — no advertising, no tracking.
approach_page.hero.title: A rigorous, independent process.
approach_page.step1.title: Diagnose.
approach_page.step1.subtitle: Know exactly where you stand.
approach_page.step1.body: We define your objectives and risk profile, then audit your current banking relationships — identifying what is aligned, what is costly, and what should be challenged.
approach_page.step1.deliverable.label: Deliverable
approach_page.step1.deliverable.title: Investment Profile & Banking Audit
approach_page.step1.duration.label: Duration
approach_page.step1.duration.title: 1 – 3 weeks
approach_page.step1.li1: Investment goals, risk profile and time horizon
approach_page.step1.li2: Current banks, mandates and asset allocation
approach_page.step1.li4: Full fee review: management, custody and retrocessions
approach_page.step2.title: Select & Negotiate.
approach_page.step2.subtitle: Choose on merit, not relationships.
approach_page.step2.body: For each mandate, we run a dedicated tender across eligible wealth managers, compare proposals side by side, and negotiate fees and terms on your behalf.
approach_page.step2.deliverable.label: Deliverable
approach_page.step2.deliverable.title: Shortlist of suitable private banks
approach_page.step2.deliverable.sub: A ranked comparison of the best-fit providers for your profile and mandate.
approach_page.step2.duration.label: Duration
approach_page.step2.duration.title: 2 – 4 weeks
approach_page.step2.li1: One RFP per mandate across eligible private banks
approach_page.step2.li2: Side-by-side comparison of fees, service and reporting
approach_page.step2.li3: Final selection made together with you
approach_page.step3.title: Monitor.
approach_page.step3.subtitle: Keep the mandate accountable.
approach_page.step3.body: After onboarding, we monitor whether each mandate stays aligned with your objectives — and act when standards slip.
approach_page.step3.deliverable.label: Deliverable
approach_page.step3.deliverable.title: Governance Report & Online Reporting
approach_page.step3.duration.label: Format
approach_page.step3.duration.title: First 12 months included
approach_page.step3.duration.sub: Then continued governance at a reduced annual rate.
approach_page.step3.li1: Performance and risk reviewed against agreed objectives
approach_page.step3.li2: Verification of fees, costs and negotiated terms
approach_page.step3.li3: Consolidated online reporting across all providers
fees.heading: Zero retrocessions. Zero commissions. Paid only by you.
fees.sub: Our fees are largely offset by savings negotiated with your bank within the first 12 months. We never receive commissions from banks.
fees.note: Fees vary according to portfolio complexity, number of banking relationships and scope of mandate. A preliminary conversation is always free.
fees.zero: Zero commissions from banks. We are paid only by you — never by the institutions we evaluate.
expertise_page.hero.title: When life changes, banking must too.
expertise_page.hero.sub: Our work is most impactful at life inflection points — when the stakes are high and an independent voice is essential.
expertise_page.uc1.title: Divorce & Asset Separation
expertise_page.uc1.body: When shared accounts and joint mandates must be untangled, we help define which institution serves each party's future needs — and negotiate the transition with full confidentiality.
expertise_page.uc2.title: Inheritance & Estate Transition
expertise_page.uc2.body: Inheriting a banking relationship is not the same as choosing one. We audit the existing setup, assess suitability for the heir's profile, and manage the transition with minimal disruption.
expertise_page.uc3.title: Widowhood — Banking Continuity
expertise_page.uc3.body: The surviving spouse often inherits banking arrangements they never chose and may not understand. We provide clarity, independence, and a structured review at a time when simplicity matters most.
expertise_page.uc4.title: Business Sale — Private Banking Setup
expertise_page.uc4.body: A significant liquidity event demands a private banking setup that reflects new realities. We run a full market process to identify the right partners for significant, newly liquid assets.
expertise_page.uc5.title: Corporate Treasury — Partner Selection
expertise_page.uc5.body: Family offices and SMEs holding idle treasury need banking partners optimised for yield, security and flexibility. We identify and negotiate with suitable institutions.
expertise_page.uc6.title: Expatriation — New Banking Setup
expertise_page.uc6.body: Relocating internationally means rethinking every banking relationship. We help new arrivals in Switzerland — and Swiss residents moving abroad — build a banking structure that fits their new reality.
expertise_page.cta.text: Not sure if your situation fits?
expertise_page.cta.sub: Every engagement begins with a no-commitment conversation. We will tell you honestly whether we can add value — and what a structured review would involve.
publications_page.hero.title: Perspectives on private banking.
publications_page.hero.sub: Independent analysis of fees, governance, mandate performance and wealth transition — published for families who want to think clearly about their banking relationships.
team_page.hero.title: Independent by design.
team_page.name: Gaylord Perruchon
team_page.bio: Gaylord Perruchon is the Principal of IM Wealth Select®. Based in Geneva, he is a CAIA Charterholder with over 20 years of experience across institutional asset management.
team_page.zero.title: No retrocessions. Ever.
team_page.zero.body: We receive no commissions, retrocessions or benefits from any bank or manager we evaluate. Our only source of revenue is your fee.
team_page.tech.heading: Institutional-grade tools, applied to private wealth.
team_page.tech.body: The research, analytics and manager-selection disciplines used by institutional investors — adapted to individual and family mandates.
contact_page.hero.title: Start with a confidential conversation.
contact_page.hero.sub: Fill in the form and Gaylord Perruchon will respond personally within one business day. All communications are treated with strict confidentiality.
contact_page.form.message.placeholder: Describe your situation briefly — current banking arrangement, what prompted this review, specific concerns...
contact_page.form.privacy: Your details are treated with absolute confidentiality. We will never share your information with any third party, including banks or investment managers.
privacy_page.hero.title: Legal notice & privacy policy.
